savoir_faire.title: OUR
lines: 19 years of experience. Plumbing, electrical work, tiling, painting, insulation, outdoor landscaping.
A single point of contact who coordinates all the trades for a turnkey result.
We serve homeowners, co-ownerships and businesses in the Basel area and across the tri-border region.

items.name: michel schlachter
items.text: We are extremely satisfied with the renovation of our two rooms. The sanding, plastering and painting work was carried out with great professionalism and care. Clean site, deadlines met and very good advice throughout the project. High-quality work that we recommend without hesitation!

items.name: Nadia MEZIANI
items.text: I called on Aiman Renovation for work at my mother's home — installing an accessible shower and washbasin, fitting a new door and repairing the kitchen ceiling following water damage.

items.name: F R
items.text: Highly recommended! Excellent communication in English, very precise and conscientious work at a fair price. Also very flexible when it comes to working hours. Top craftsman!

items.name: yves lesueur
items.text: Flat renovation carried out with care, seriousness and professionalism. I highly recommend this company. Quick contact and communication.

items.name: Youssef Yo
items.text: Very professional, he makes sure everything is spotless and well organised. Excellent service.

items.name: Sarah Runser
items.text: Impeccable work replacing the ventilation unit, and a very friendly technician. Highly recommended.

items.name: Yann Dos santos

about.seo_description: 19 years of renovation experience in Saint-Louis and the Basel area. Discover the story of Aiman Renovation, our values and our team of skilled craftsmen.
about.hero_subtitle: {experience} years of experience. One goal: to renovate your dreams to the last detail.

story_texts.story: While the others played outside, he was drawing houses. He didn't know it yet, but that school notebook was going to change his life.
Cement under his nails, aching back, 12 hours a day. Nobody gave him anything for free. Every wall built, every pipe welded — he learnt everything the hard way.
There were days when everything fell apart. Lost contracts, closed doors, rain that wouldn't stop. But a man who falls is not a man who's finished. He's a man who's learning.
Team leader. The one you call when things get complicated. 19 years in the field, hundreds of projects, and one certainty: he was ready.
Aiman Renovation. Not just a name on a jacket. A promise. One single point of contact, every trade, zero compromise on quality.
In the heart of the Three Borders region, the boy who drew houses now builds them for real. And he has just one motto: to renovate your dreams to the last detail.

services.hero_subtitle: From floor to ceiling, inside and out — we master every trade.
services.budget_disclaimer: Indicative prices incl. VAT for the Basel area and Haut-Rhin. Every project is unique — the detailed quote after a site survey is the only binding document.
services.cta_subtitle: Describe your project and receive a free quote within 4 days. No obligation.
services.service_meta_suffix: in the Basel Area — Free Quote
services.service_meta_desc_suffix: Qualified contractor in the Basel tri-border area. Free quote within 4 days.

service_items.title: Kitchen renovation
service_items.description: Transform your kitchen into a modern, functional space. From the worktop to the finishing touches, we take care of every aspect of your project.
service_items.longDescription:
The kitchen is the heart of your home — the place where you cook, share and come together. At Aiman Renovation, we design kitchens that combine aesthetics with practicality, tailored to your lifestyle and budget. Whether you want an open-plan kitchen, a central island, or simply to modernise your cabinet fronts and worktop, we support you from start to finish.

Our teams master every trade required: plumbing, electrical work, tiling, joinery, painting. We coordinate the entire project to deliver a turnkey result, so you don't have to manage multiple tradespeople. Every kitchen is designed to measure, taking into account the existing layout, natural light and your daily habits.

We work with well-known suppliers for the quality of their materials: quartz, granite or high-resistance laminate worktops, ceramic or glass splashbacks, durable tap fittings. The result: a kitchen that stands the test of time and adds value to your property.

process.detail: Site survey to record exact dimensions and identify constraints (water supply, electrical, ventilation).
2D/3D layout plan, choice of materials, colours and fixtures together with you.
Careful dismantling, waste removal and preparation of walls and floors.
Plumbing refurbishment, electrical upgrade to standard, tiling and splashback installation.
Cabinet assembly, worktop fitting, connections, painting and final clean.

service_items.whyPro: A kitchen renovation involves plumbing, electrical work, tiling and joinery — all trades that require precise expertise. A faulty seal under the sink, an under-sized electrical circuit or a poorly fitted worktop can lead to costly problems. Hiring a professional means work that meets standards, smooth coordination between trades and a result that lives up to your expectations. Plus, our 10-year guarantee protects you.
service_items.priceRange: €8,000 – €25,000 depending on the area and materials chosen

service_items.title: Bathroom renovation
service_items.description: Create the bathroom of your dreams. Walk-in shower, bathtub, designer basin — we deliver every style.
service_items.longDescription:
Your bathroom should be a wellness space — functional and pleasant every day. Whether you want to replace an ageing bathtub with a walk-in shower, modernise the tiling or completely rethink the layout, Aiman Renovation offers bespoke solutions tailored to your space and budget.

Waterproofing is at the heart of our concerns: we use under-tile waterproofing systems (SPEC) compliant with current French building standards (DTU), guaranteeing a leak-free bathroom for years to come. Our plumbers carry out connections with care, using durable materials (PEX, multilayer).

From wall-mounted basins to double vanity units, large-format tiles to mosaics, we help you choose the fixtures and finishes that match your taste. We also install accessibility solutions (grab bars, level-access showers) for people with reduced mobility.

process.detail: Inspection of existing plumbing, waterproofing check, precise room measurements.
Selection of sanitary ware, tap fittings, tiles and accessories according to your wishes and budget.
Removal of old fixtures, stripping walls and floors, checking substrates.
Hot/cold water network overhaul and drainage, waterproofing system installation (SPEC).
Wall and floor tiling, sanitary ware installation, silicone joints, painting and ventilation.

service_items.whyPro: The bathroom is the most technically demanding room in your home. Poor waterproofing can lead to leaks, mould and serious structural damage. Plumbing must be flawless to avoid leaks. Our craftsmen master DTU standards and under-tile waterproofing techniques. With Aiman Renovation, you benefit from a 10-year guarantee and complete peace of mind.
service_items.priceRange: €6,000 – €18,000 depending on the layout and fixtures

service_items.title: Electrical work
service_items.description: Bringing your electrical system up to standard, full rewiring or extending your installation. Safety and compliance guaranteed.
service_items.longDescription:
An outdated or non-compliant electrical installation poses a major safety risk. In Alsace, many older properties need upgrading to meet NF C 15-100 regulations. Aiman Renovation handles the complete or partial renovation of your electrical system, from the consumer unit to the sockets and lighting.

We carry out a full diagnosis of your existing installation, identify non-compliance issues and propose a tailored renovation plan. Consumer unit replacement, new wiring runs, additional sockets and switches, high-performance LED lighting — every intervention is carried out in compliance with current standards.

We also offer home automation solutions to control your lighting, roller shutters and heating from your smartphone. A smarter, more energy-efficient and more comfortable home.

process.detail: Full inspection of the existing installation, identification of non-compliance issues and risks.
Detailed electrical schematic with positioning of light points, sockets and dedicated circuits.
Running conduits and cables, recessed or surface-mounted depending on the configuration.
Fitting the new consumer unit with differential circuit breakers and surge protection.
Compliance tests, earth verification, commissioning and handover of the electrical schematic.

service_items.whyPro: Electricity does not forgive approximation. A poorly done installation can cause short circuits, fires or electrocution. The NF C 15-100 standard imposes strict rules that only a qualified professional can apply correctly. Furthermore, a compliance certificate (Consuel) is mandatory for major renovations. Entrust your electrical work to Aiman Renovation for a safe and compliant installation.
service_items.priceRange: €3,000 – €12,000 depending on the scope of the renovation (flat or house)

service_items.title: Plumbing
service_items.description: Installation and renovation of your water systems. From pipe replacement to creating new water points.
service_items.longDescription:
Plumbing is the invisible backbone of your home. Old lead or galvanised steel pipes can affect your water quality and cause insidious leaks. Aiman Renovation steps in to renovate, replace or create your supply and drainage networks using modern, durable materials.

We replace old pipes with PEX or multilayer, install thermodynamic or conventional water heaters, and create new water points wherever you need them: utility room, extra WC, summer kitchen. Every intervention is designed to optimise your comfort while reducing your water consumption.

In co-ownerships and individual houses alike, we work on risers, sub-meters and public network connections. Our local knowledge of the Haut-Rhin area allows us to work efficiently with the local water utilities.

process.detail: Visual inspection and pressure test to assess the condition of the existing network.
Detailed quote with choice of materials (PEX, multilayer, copper) and network plan.
Removal of old pipes, installation of the new network with zone isolation valves.
Connecting sanitary fixtures, water heater, washing machine and dishwasher.
Pressure leak tests, flow rate verification and confirmation of no leaks.

service_items.whyPro: A water leak can cause considerable damage in just a few hours: damaged ceilings, mould, short circuits. Plumbing connections require mastery of soldering, crimping techniques and sanitary standards. Choosing Aiman Renovation means a reliable network, clean water and coverage under our 10-year guarantee in the event of a claim.
service_items.priceRange: €2,000 – €10,000 depending on the number of water points and complexity

service_items.title: Tiling and flooring
service_items.description: Tiling, parquet, vinyl or polished concrete. A new floor transforms an entire room.
service_items.longDescription:
The floor is the first thing you notice when you walk into a room. Well-laid tiles, warm parquet or contemporary polished concrete instantly transform the atmosphere of your interior. Aiman Renovation masters the laying of every type of floor covering, from large-format tiles to solid parquet and premium vinyl.

Every project starts with meticulous substrate preparation: screeding, levelling, damp treatment where necessary. It's this invisible step that guarantees a perfect, long-lasting result. We then lay the covering of your choice with particular attention to cuts, joints and threshold finishes.

For outdoor areas, we create porcelain stoneware terraces, natural stone pathways and non-slip pool surrounds. Our experienced tilers work in flats in central Saint-Louis as well as houses in the surrounding villages of the Basel area.

process.detail: Checking flatness, moisture levels and solidity of the existing floor.
Screeding, bonding primer, flowing screed if necessary for a perfectly level surface.
Defining the laying direction, joint size and pattern (straight, diagonal, staggered).
Glued or floating installation depending on the material, precise cuts around obstacles.
Colour-matched grout, skirting boards, threshold strips, deep cleaning.

service_items.whyPro: Poorly laid tiles crack, sound hollow and come loose within a few years. Substrate preparation, adhesive choice and expansion joint compliance are technical steps that require genuine expertise. Our tilers have years of experience and use professional tools (diamond tile cutter, laser level) for a flawless, guaranteed result.
service_items.priceRange: €40 – €120 / m² including installation, depending on the type of covering

service_items.title: Facades and insulation
service_items.description: Facade renovation, external wall insulation (EWI) or internal insulation. Improve comfort and reduce your energy bills.
service_items.longDescription:
In Alsace, harsh winters make thermal insulation essential. A poorly insulated facade means up to 25% heat loss and soaring heating bills. Aiman Renovation specialises in facade renovation and thermal insulation, whether external (EWI) or internal.

External wall insulation (EWI) is the most effective solution: it eliminates thermal bridges, protects the building structure from the elements and beautifies the facade at the same time. We install insulation boards (polystyrene, mineral wool or wood fibre) covered with a finishing render in the colour of your choice.

For co-ownerships, we carry out complete facade renovations including crack repair, rising damp treatment and the application of breathable renders suited to Alsatian architecture. Our projects comply with local regulations and the requirements of heritage architects where necessary.

process.detail: Inspection of the facade condition, identification of cracks, water ingress and thermal bridges.
Secure scaffolding installation with perimeter protection (nets, sheeting).
High-pressure cleaning, crack repair, anti-moss and damp treatment.
Mechanical fixing and bonding of insulation boards, installation of starter and corner profiles.
Application of finishing render (scraped, floated or textured), painting, site clean-up.

service_items.whyPro: Insulation and facade renovation are technical works that affect the long-term durability of your building. Poorly installed external insulation can lead to water ingress, delamination and loss of thermal efficiency. These works are eligible for MaPrimeRénov' and CEE grants, but only when carried out by a qualified RGE professional. Aiman Renovation assists you with the grant applications to reduce your out-of-pocket cost.
service_items.priceRange: €80 – €200 / m² for full EWI, €30 – €80 / m² for a standard facade renovation

service_items.title: Landscaping
service_items.description: Design and creation of your outdoor spaces. Terraces, pathways, planting, fencing.
service_items.longDescription:
Your outdoor space is the first impression people get of your home. Well-designed landscaping adds value to your property, extends your living space and provides a pleasant setting all year round. Aiman Renovation designs and creates gardens, terraces and outdoor spaces suited to the Alsatian climate and your personal taste.

Composite decking, pedestal-mounted slabs or natural stone terraces, block-paved pathways, retaining walls, aluminium or timber fencing — we master all materials and techniques. We also integrate outdoor lighting (recessed spots, bollards, LED string lights) so you can enjoy your garden in the evening.

Our designs take account of the terrain (slope, drainage, soil type), aspect and your budget. We plant local species resistant to frost and install automatic irrigation systems where needed. From a freshly sown lawn to flowering borders, your outdoor space comes to life.

process.detail: Soil analysis, slope assessment, natural drainage and sun exposure evaluation.
Project design including terrace, pathway, planting and lighting layout.
Excavation, levelling, geotextile installation and foundation preparation.
Building the terrace, pathways, retaining walls, fencing and gates.
Planting, turfing, lighting installation and clean-up.

service_items.whyPro: Poorly designed outdoor works deteriorate quickly: a terrace that lifts with frost, a pathway that sinks, standing water. Mastery of earthworks, drainage and foundations is essential for a lasting result. Our teams understand the specific challenges of the Alsatian climate (frost, heavy rain) and select appropriate materials. 10-year guarantee included on landscape masonry works.
service_items.priceRange: €5,000 – €30,000 depending on the area and landscaping requirements

service_items.title: Painting and finishing
service_items.description: Interior and exterior painting, decorative renders, wallpaper. The final touch that makes all the difference.
service_items.longDescription:
Painting is much more than a coat of paint: it's the art of enhancing your spaces. Paint applied properly, on a perfectly prepared surface, radically transforms the atmosphere of a room. Aiman Renovation carries out all your interior and exterior painting work with artisan care.

We always start with surface preparation: filling cracks, sanding, cleaning, applying a bonding primer. This step accounts for 70% of the work time and makes all the difference between an amateur result and a professional finish. We use paints from recognised brands (Tollens, Sikkens, Zolpan) in matt, satin or gloss finishes according to the desired effect.

Decorative renders (tadelakt, stucco, polished concrete walls), designer wallpaper, textured effects — we also create bespoke finishes to give your interior character. For exteriors, we apply microporous paints that let walls breathe while protecting them from the elements.

process.detail: Covering floors and furniture, masking tape on frames and skirting boards.
Filling, sanding, cleaning, primer application. Treatment of stains and mould.
First bonding coat to even out the surface and optimise the finish coat adhesion.
Application of 2 coats of paint with a uniform result, no streaks or drips.
Inspection under raking light, touch-ups if needed, removal of coverings and clean-up.

service_items.whyPro: A successful paint job relies 70% on surface preparation. Without proper sanding, filling and the right primer, paint blisters, peels and yellows prematurely. Our professional painters master preparation techniques, choose the right products for each surface (plaster, wood, metal, cement) and apply paint with professional tools for a flawless finish.
service_items.priceRange: €20 – €45 / m² walls and ceilings, preparation and 2 coats included

service_items.title: Electric vehicle charging point
service_items.description: Installation of electric vehicle charging points. At home or in shared buildings.
service_items.longDescription:
Electric vehicles are becoming mainstream, and with them comes the need for reliable home charging solutions. Aiman Renovation holds the IRVE certification (Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure) and installs charging points in individual homes and shared residential buildings in the Haut-Rhin area.

We install wallboxes from 7.4 kW to 22 kW depending on your meter capacity and charging needs. In a private home, installation is generally straightforward: cable run from the consumer unit, charger mounted in the garage or outdoors (IP54). In shared buildings, we handle the technical study, general meeting presentation and individual connection.

IRVE certification is mandatory for the installation of chargers above 3.7 kW and is a condition for accessing financial grants. With Aiman Renovation, you benefit from a certified installer, guaranteed equipment and full support in obtaining the French tax credit (up to €300) and the ADVENIR grant for shared buildings.

process.detail: Checking meter capacity, distance from consumer unit to charger, selecting the right charger type.
Detailed pricing with grant simulation (tax credit, ADVENIR grant).
Running a dedicated line from the consumer unit, fitting the appropriate circuit breaker and differential.
Wall or post mounting, electrical connection, configuration and charge test.
Charger configuration (power, schedules), handover of the IRVE certificate and user guide.

service_items.whyPro: Installing a charging point involves high-power electrics and requires mandatory IRVE certification above 3.7 kW. Inadequate wiring can cause overheating, a tripped breaker or worse, a fire. IRVE certification is also a condition for accessing the tax credit and ADVENIR grant. Take no risks: use a certified installer.

service_items.title: Solar panels
service_items.description: Generate your own electricity. Rooftop solar panel installation.
service_items.longDescription:
The Haut-Rhin region enjoys favourable sunshine for solar energy production, with over 1,700 hours of sun per year. Installing solar panels on your roof means producing your own electricity, reducing your bills and contributing to the energy transition. Aiman Renovation supports you throughout this process, from the feasibility study to commissioning.

We install the latest generation monocrystalline panels, offering optimal efficiency even in cloudy weather. With self-consumption and surplus sold back to EDF OA, you recoup your investment in 8 to 12 years while increasing your property value. For a typical 100 m² house, a 3 kWp installation (8 panels) covers 30 to 50% of your annual consumption.

Grants are numerous and cumulative: self-consumption bonus (up to €1,500 for 3 kWp), EDF OA purchase obligation at a guaranteed rate for 20 years, reduced VAT at 10% for installations under 3 kWp. We handle the complete paperwork and manage the administrative steps (town hall, Enedis, EDF OA).

process.detail: Analysis of your roof orientation and pitch, production calculation and financial simulation.
Prior declaration to the town hall, Enedis connection request, EDF OA contract.
Fitting mounting rails, installing panels and micro-inverters on the roof.
Wiring, AC/DC junction box installation, connection to the consumer unit and Linky meter.
Production test, monitoring activation, handover of the complete technical file.

service_items.whyPro: Solar panel installation involves rooftop work (fall risk) and high-voltage electrical connections. Non-compliant installation can cause roof leaks, fire risk or sub-optimal production. To qualify for grants (self-consumption bonus, reduced VAT), the installation must be carried out by a qualified RGE professional. Aiman Renovation manages the entire project for you.
service_items.priceRange: €7,000 – €15,000 for 3 to 6 kWp (before self-consumption bonus of €1,000 to €2,500)

service_items.title: Outdoor maintenance
service_items.description: Keep your outdoor spaces immaculate all year round. Mowing, trimming, clearing, cleaning — one-off or annual contract.
service_items.longDescription:
A beautiful garden needs maintaining. But between work, family and daily life, who has time to mow every week, trim the hedges twice a year and clean the terrace before summer? Aiman Renovation takes care of the complete maintenance of your outdoor spaces so you can enjoy them without lifting a finger.

We offer one-off interventions — mowing, hedge trimming, brush clearing, leaf collection, anti-moss treatment — but above all, annual contracts. You choose the frequency (weekly, fortnightly or monthly), we schedule the visits and you don't have to think about it any more.

We also have professional hot and cold high-pressure cleaning equipment. Terraces, pathways, facades, roofs — we restore all your property's outdoor surfaces to their former glory. Hot-water cleaning is particularly effective against moss, lichen and ingrained grease stains.

Our contracts include a seasonal review: in spring, we prepare (scarifying, weeding, fertilising); in summer, we maintain; in autumn, we protect (leaf collection, trimming, mulching); in winter, we monitor. It's turnkey peace of mind.

process.detail: We evaluate your grounds: area, vegetation type, current condition, specific needs.
Detailed quote with a tailored maintenance programme: visit frequency, services included, monthly or annual rate.
A visit calendar is set according to the seasons. You are notified in advance of each intervention.
Our teams work according to the schedule: mowing, trimming, cleaning, seasonal treatments.
An annual review to adjust services according to your garden's evolution and your needs.

service_items.whyPro: Regular professional maintenance preserves your property's value and the health of your plants. A poorly trimmed hedge becomes invasive, an unscarified lawn suffocates, an untreated terrace becomes slippery and dangerous. Our teams know the local Alsatian species and adapt care to the seasons. With a contract, you're guaranteed constant monitoring without having to think about it.
service_items.priceRange: From €80 / one-off intervention, annual contract from €150 / month

service_items.title: After-sales and emergency repairs
service_items.description: Water leak, electrical fault, unblocking — we respond 24/7 to secure and repair.
service_items.longDescription:
A water leak at 10 pm, a short circuit on a Sunday, water damage threatening your flat — emergencies don't wait, and neither do we. Aiman Renovation responds 24/7 to secure your home before the damage worsens.

Our service covers all emergencies: plumbing (pipe, tap, cistern, water heater leaks, water damage), electrical (tripped breaker, burnt socket, power outage, short circuit), high-pressure drain unblocking, and anything else requiring rapid intervention. We step in to stop the damage, secure the installations and provide a quote for restoration.

For our existing clients, we also provide after-sales service on projects we've completed. A problem with an installation we fitted? We come back, diagnose and repair. That's what long-term trust looks like.

process.detail: You call us, we assess the situation by phone and give you the first steps to take while waiting.
A technician attends as quickly as possible to secure and stop the damage.
Precise identification of the cause: leak, short circuit, water ingress. Photos and report.
Immediate repair if possible, or temporary safety measures with a quote for permanent restoration.
Scheduling of restoration work if needed. Support with insurance claims.

service_items.whyPro: In an emergency, every minute counts. An untreated leak can cause thousands of euros of damage in just a few hours. A faulty electrical circuit poses a fire risk. Using a qualified professional guarantees a safe, compliant and documented intervention for your insurance. Our local knowledge of Saint-Louis and the Basel area allows us to respond quickly.
service_items.priceRange: Call-out + diagnosis: from €90, repair on quote

panel_recap.title: Summary
panel_recap.magicplan_subtitle: Scan your rooms in 5 min with the free MagicPlan app.
panel_recap.magicplan_link_hint: Paste the MagicPlan share link here
panel_recap.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

steps.title: Download the app
steps.subtitle: Free — 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Install MagicPlan on your phone. It's free, no account needed.
steps.tip: Already installed? Skip to the next step.

steps.title: Open and create a project
steps.subtitle: 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Open MagicPlan, tap the big "+" button, then choose "New project". Give it a name (e.g. "My house").
steps.tip: Choose "Scanner" mode for automatic wall detection.

steps.title: Scan your first room
steps.subtitle: 2 minutes per room
steps.instruction: Stand in the centre of the room. Point your phone at a corner and follow the on-screen instructions. Turn slowly towards each corner.
tips: Hold the phone at chest height
Doors and windows are detected automatically
Repeat for each room to be renovated

steps.title: Check the result
steps.subtitle: 1 minute
steps.instruction: MagicPlan generates a 2D plan with measurements. Tap a dimension to correct it if needed.
steps.tip: It doesn't need to be perfect — we'll refine it together.

steps.title: Send us the plan
steps.subtitle: 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Tap "Share" in MagicPlan, then choose "PDF" or "Link". Copy the link and paste it in the message field of your quote below.
tips: Option 1: Paste the link in the "Message" field of the quote
Option 2: Send the PDF by email to contact@aiman-renovation.fr

success.title: Request sent!
success.message: Thank you for your trust. We have received your quote request and will get back to you within 24 hours.
success.email_sent: A confirmation email has been sent to your address.

faq.seo_description: Answers to your renovation questions: free quotes, timescales, guarantees, financial grants. Contractor Basel area, Haut-Rhin.
faq.hero_subtitle: Everything you need to know before starting your project.
faq.no_answer: Can't find the answer to your question?

items.question: How do I get a quote?
items.answer: Fill in our online form or call us on 06 33 49 69 25. We will send you a detailed quote within 4 days after the site survey.

items.question: Is the quote free?
items.answer: Yes, all our quotes are free and without obligation. The on-site survey is included — it allows us to assess your project precisely and provide an accurate estimate.

items.question: What does your quote include?
items.answer: Our quote details every item of work: labour, materials, supplies, estimated timescales and payment terms. No surprises: the quoted price is the final price, unless you request changes during the project.

items.question: How long will it take to receive my quote?
items.answer: We commit to sending your quote within 4 days of the site survey. For complex projects (facade, solar panels), allow 5 to 7 working days.

items.question: What is your service area?
items.answer: We work in the Basel tri-border area: Basel, Riehen, Allschwil, Binningen (Switzerland), Lörrach, Weil am Rhein (Germany), Saint-Louis, Huningue, Hésingue, Village-Neuf, Blotzheim, Bartenheim (France), and beyond on request.

items.question: How long does the work take?
items.answer: It depends on the project. As a guide: bathroom 2–3 weeks, kitchen 3–4 weeks, painting a flat 1–2 weeks, facade/EWI 3–6 weeks. The precise schedule is included in the quote.

items.question: Do you work in shared buildings?
items.answer: Yes: facade renovation, insulation, common area refurbishment, collective EV charging installation. We coordinate with the property management company and comply with the building regulations.

items.question: Can I stay in my home during the work?
items.answer: In most cases, yes. We organise the site by zones to minimise disruption. For a full renovation (kitchen + bathroom simultaneously), we can advise on temporary accommodation.

items.question: How does a typical project run?
items.answer: After signing the quote: 1) Planning and ordering materials, 2) Site protection and strip-out, 3) Technical work (plumbing, electrical), 4) Finishing (tiling, painting), 5) Handover with you. A single point of contact keeps you informed at every stage.

items.question: Will the worksite be kept clean?
items.answer: We are committed to maintaining a clean worksite. Protective sheeting is installed from day one, rubble is removed regularly, and a thorough clean is carried out at the end of the work. You get your home back ready to live in.

items.question: What about noise and disruption for neighbours?
items.answer: We observe statutory working hours (8 am–12 pm / 2 pm–6 pm on weekdays). Noisy work (demolition, drilling) is concentrated in defined time slots. In shared buildings, we inform neighbours by letter before work begins.

items.question: Will I have a dedicated contact person?
items.answer: Yes, Aiman personally supervises every project. You have a direct number and can follow the progress of your work in real time. We send regular progress photos by email or WhatsApp.

items.question: What guarantees do you offer?
items.answer: We are covered by professional liability insurance and a 10-year structural guarantee. Specifically: completion guarantee (1 year), equipment guarantee (2 years) and structural guarantee covering major works and waterproofing (10 years).

items.question: Are you IRVE certified?
items.answer: Yes, we hold the IRVE certification (Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure), which is mandatory for installing charging points above 3.7 kW. This certification enables you to benefit from the French tax credit and the ADVENIR grant.

items.question: Are your tradespeople qualified?
items.answer: All our tradespeople are qualified and experienced in their field. Our team has 19 years of experience in the building trade. We hold the necessary certifications (IRVE, electrical qualifications) and regularly attend training to stay up to date with standards and techniques.

items.question: What is MaPrimeRénov'?
items.answer: MaPrimeRénov' is a French government grant to fund energy renovation work: insulation, heating, ventilation, solar panels. The amount depends on your income and the type of work. It can cover up to 90% of the cost for modest households. We help you put together the application.

items.question: What are CEE (Energy Savings Certificates)?
items.answer: CEEs are grants paid by energy suppliers (EDF, Engie, TotalEnergies) to encourage energy-saving work. Wall insulation, window replacement, thermodynamic water heater installation: these grants can be combined with MaPrimeRénov' and can amount to several thousand euros.

items.question: Can I get an éco-PTZ?
items.answer: The éco-prêt à taux zéro (éco-PTZ) is a French interest-free loan for energy renovation work, up to €50,000. It is available regardless of income, through your bank. It can be combined with MaPrimeRénov' and CEE grants.

items.question: Is VAT reduced on my work?
items.answer: Yes, for properties over 2 years old in France: 10% VAT for standard renovation work (painting, tiling, plumbing), 5.5% VAT for energy renovation work (insulation, solar panels under 3 kWp). The reduced VAT is applied automatically on our quote.

items.question: Can you help me with grant applications?
items.answer: Absolutely. We guide you through every step: simulating the grants you're entitled to, preparing MaPrimeRénov' and CEE applications, requesting an éco-PTZ from your bank. Our goal is to minimise your out-of-pocket cost.

items.question: What are the payment terms?
items.answer: 30% deposit on signing the quote, then staged payments according to progress (typically at the halfway point), and the balance on handover. We accept bank transfers and cheques.

items.question: Can I spread the payments?
items.answer: Yes, payment is naturally staged according to project progress. For major projects, we can adapt the payment schedule to your situation. The éco-PTZ (interest-free loan) is also an option for spreading the cost without charges.

realisations.seo_title: Our Portfolio — Renovation Projects Basel Area
realisations.seo_description: Discover our completed renovation projects in the Basel area and Haut-Rhin: kitchen, bathroom, facades, landscaping. Before/after photos.
realisations.hero_subtitle: Every project is unique. Here is an overview of our transformations in the Basel area and Haut-Rhin. Renovations carried out with rigour, from the first hammer blow to the final touch.
realisations.no_results: No projects in this category yet.

projects.title: Contemporary open-plan kitchen
projects.description: Complete transformation of a closed kitchen into an open living space. Central island, quartz worktop, recessed LED lighting.

projects.title: Modern master bathroom
projects.description: Replacement of a bathtub with a walk-in shower. Wall-hung double vanity, large-format marble-effect tiles, illuminated niche.

projects.title: External wall insulation facade
projects.description: External thermal insulation of a 1970s house. 16 cm polystyrene, stone-tone scraped render. Estimated energy savings: 40%.

projects.title: Landscaped garden with terrace
projects.description: Creation of a composite wood terrace, interlocking paver pathways, hedge planting, outdoor LED lighting.

projects.title: EV charging station in condominium
projects.description: Installation of a 7.4 kW wallbox in the underground car park of a 24-unit condominium. Cable run from the main distribution board.

projects.title: 6 kWp photovoltaic installation
projects.description: Installation of 16 monocrystalline panels on a south-facing roof. Self-consumption with surplus feed-in. Estimated output: 6,500 kWh/year.

projects.title: Full apartment renovation
projects.description: Complete painting (walls and ceilings), laminate flooring, electrical upgrade and bathroom replacement. A fully transformed apartment.

projects.title: Electrical compliance upgrade
projects.description: Complete replacement of the electrical panel, new wiring, additional sockets and switches, LED lighting throughout the house.

projects.title: House plumbing renovation
projects.description: Complete replacement of lead pipes with PEX. Installation of a heat-pump water heater. New water point in the utility room.

projects.title: Living room and kitchen tiling
projects.description: Laying of 60x120 polished stoneware tiles in concrete effect. Full substrate preparation, colour-matched grout, cove skirting tiles.

variants.title: Oops, load-bearing wall!
variants.subtitle: Even the best plans sometimes have a wall in the wrong place.

variants.title: Area under renovation

variants.title: Out of level!
variants.subtitle: We checked with the laser — this page isn't plumb.

variants.title: Door without a lock
variants.subtitle: The key may exist, but the door isn't there.

variants.title: Foundations not found
variants.subtitle: Can't build this page — the foundations are missing.

variants.title: Botched paint job
variants.subtitle: We repainted the URL but the page disappeared under the coat.

variants.title: Missing tile
variants.subtitle: There's a tile missing from the plan — this page doesn't exist.

variants.title: Site closed
variants.subtitle: This project is finished... or never started.

cgv.seo_description: Terms and conditions of sale of Aiman Renovation — building renovation works.

sections.title: Article 1 — Purpose and scope
sections.content:
These Terms and Conditions of Sale (hereinafter "T&Cs") apply to all building renovation services carried out by {company}, a simplified joint-stock company (SASU) with share capital as defined in its articles of association, registered with the Trade and Companies Register, with its registered office in {city} (hereinafter "the Company"), for its private or professional clients (hereinafter "the Client").

Any order for works implies unreserved acceptance of these T&Cs, which prevail over any other document of the Client, unless specific conditions are agreed in writing between the parties.

sections.title: Article 2 — Quotes and contract formation
sections.content:
2.1. The Company provides a free, detailed quote following a site survey. The quote specifies the nature and scope of the works, the materials to be used, the estimated completion time and the total price including VAT.

2.2. The quote is valid for thirty (30) days from the date of issue, unless otherwise stated.

2.3. The contract is formed upon signature of the quote by the Client, accompanied by the handwritten annotation "Approved". Return of the signed quote constitutes acceptance of these T&Cs.

2.4. Any amendment to the original quote must be the subject of a written addendum signed by both parties. Additional works not provided for in the original quote shall only be carried out after written acceptance by the Client of the corresponding new price.

sections.title: Article 3 — Prices and revision
sections.content:
3.1. Prices are quoted in euros including all taxes (TTC). The applicable VAT rate is that in force on the date of invoicing (10% for renovation works in properties over 2 years old, 20% in other cases, 5.5% for eligible energy renovation works).

3.2. Prices do not include materials supplied by the Client, unless otherwise stated in the quote.

3.3. In the event of a significant change in the cost of materials or labour between the date of the quote and the start of works (exceeding 5%), the Company reserves the right to revise the price after informing the Client, who has fifteen (15) days to accept or reject the revision.

sections.title: Article 4 — Payment terms
sections.content:
4.1. Unless otherwise agreed, payment terms are as follows:
— Deposit of 30% of the total amount including VAT upon signing the quote;
— Interim payment of 40% at the midpoint of the project, upon presentation of a progress report;
— Balance of 30% upon handover of the works.

4.2. Payments are made by bank transfer, cheque or cash within the legal limit. Card payments are accepted.

4.3. In the event of late payment, late payment penalties shall apply automatically at the statutory rate plus five (5) percentage points, without the need for a reminder. A flat-rate recovery indemnity of forty (40) euros shall also be payable in accordance with Article L.441-10 of the French Commercial Code.

4.4. The Company reserves the right to suspend the works in the event of non-payment of an instalment by its due date, following formal notice that has remained without effect for eight (8) days.

sections.title: Article 5 — Completion times
sections.content:
5.1. The completion times stated in the quote are given as an indication and run from receipt of the deposit and the Client's provision of all elements necessary to commence the works.

5.2. The Company undertakes to inform the Client of any foreseeable delay and its causes. Delays due to force majeure (exceptional weather, material shortages, pandemic, strikes, etc.), modifications requested by the Client or unforeseen discoveries during the works (asbestos, termites, hidden defects) shall not render the Company liable.

5.3. A delay in the completion of works shall not give rise to damages, deductions or order cancellation, except in the case of a manifestly excessive and unjustified delay.

sections.title: Article 6 — Client's obligations
Article 7 — Handover of works
sections.content:
7.1. Upon completion of the works, a handover inspection is carried out jointly by the Company and the Client. A handover report is drawn up and signed by both parties.

7.2. The handover may be:
— Without reservations: the works comply with the quote and professional standards;
— With reservations: defects noted are recorded in the report and the Company undertakes to remedy them within a reasonable time;
— Refused: in the event of major non-compliance rendering the works unfit for purpose.

7.3. In the absence of a handover report, the Client's taking possession of the premises and payment of the balance shall constitute tacit acceptance of the works.

7.4. The handover marks the start of the statutory guarantees (completion guarantee, two-year equipment guarantee, ten-year structural guarantee).

sections.title: Article 8 — Guarantees
sections.content:
8.1. Completion guarantee (Article 1792-6 of the French Civil Code): the Company undertakes to remedy all defects reported by the Client within one year of the handover.

8.2. Two-year equipment guarantee (Article 1792-3 of the French Civil Code): equipment elements that can be separated from the structure are guaranteed for two (2) years from handover.

8.3. Ten-year structural guarantee (Articles 1792 et seq. of the French Civil Code): the Company is liable for ten (10) years for damage compromising the structural integrity of the works or rendering them unfit for purpose. The Company holds ten-year structural liability insurance, details of which are available on request.

8.4. The guarantees do not cover damage resulting from abnormal use, lack of maintenance, modifications made by the Client or a third party, or force majeure.

sections.title: Article 9 — Liability
sections.content:
9.1. The Company is subject to an obligation of result regarding the conformity of the works with the quote and applicable professional standards.

9.2. The Company is covered by professional liability insurance for damage caused to third parties and the Client's property during the execution of the works.

9.3. The Company shall not be held liable for damage resulting from hidden defects in the existing structure that could not be detected during the preliminary site survey, or from materials supplied by the Client.

sections.title: Article 10 — Subcontracting
sections.content: The Company reserves the right to subcontract all or part of the works to qualified subcontractors, in compliance with French Law No. 75-1334 of 31 December 1975 on subcontracting. The Company remains solely responsible to the Client for the proper execution of works entrusted to subcontractors.

sections.title: Article 11 — Termination
sections.content:
11.1. In the event of a serious breach by either party of its obligations, the other party may terminate the contract as of right, thirty (30) days after formal notice by recorded delivery letter that has remained without effect.

11.2. In the event of termination at the Client's initiative, the works completed and materials procured remain payable. The Company shall invoice the works carried out pro rata, plus a termination indemnity of 10% of the value of the remaining works.

11.3. In the event of termination at the Company's initiative, the Client shall be reimbursed for sums paid in respect of works not yet carried out.

sections.title: Article 12 — Personal data protection
sections.content: Personal data collected in the course of the business relationship is processed in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act. The Client has the right to access, rectify, delete and port their data. To exercise these rights, the Client may send a request to {email}.

sections.title: Article 13 — Disputes and applicable law
sections.content:
13.1. These T&Cs are governed by French law.

13.2. In the event of a dispute relating to the performance or interpretation hereof, the parties shall endeavour to reach an amicable resolution. The Client is informed that they may refer the matter to a consumer mediator in accordance with Articles L.612-1 et seq. of the French Consumer Code.

13.3. Failing amicable resolution, the dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of the jurisdiction in which the Company's registered office is located.

sections.title: Article 14 — Intellectual property
sections.content: Plans, technical studies, sketches and documents provided by the Company in the course of the quote or the execution of works remain its intellectual property. They may not be disclosed to third parties, reproduced or used without the prior written consent of the Company.
